Interface IRadialTreeLayout

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control the Radial Tree layout.

[Guid("260A82A3-4F0E-4723-9E97-5FFF20CFF8DA")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRadialTreeLayout : INetworkDiagramLayout

Properties

AbsoluteUnit

Indicates whether the values set for the Initial radius is interpreted as absolute units.

bool AbsoluteUnit { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

DisjoinedGraphSpacing

Indicates the minimum spacing that separates diagram features belonging to disjoined graphs when the diagram contains such graphs.

double DisjoinedGraphSpacing { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

InitialRadius

Indicates the radius of the first concentric circle whose center is the radial tree root junctionâ€”that is, the radius of the circle around which the diagram junctions belonging to the first hierarchical level are placed.

double InitialRadius { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsActive 

bool IsActive { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Name 

string Name { get; }

Property Value

string

PreserveContainers 

bool PreserveContainers { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

PropertySet 

IPropertySet PropertySet { get; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

RadiusFactor

Indicates the multiplicative factor used to increase or decrease the radius of each concentric circle. It is also the distance that separates each concentric circle related to a hierarchical level.

double RadiusFactor { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Version 

int Version { get; }
